about.intro_left:
Founded in Montreal in 2021, **JPrunier Inc.** specializes in the **programming, integration, and design of advanced technology systems** that bridge the worlds of audiovisual, information technology, and artificial intelligence.

We create **seamless connections between the digital and physical environments**, driven by performance, reliability, and simplicity of use.
about.intro_right:
Our expertise offers **modern system programming, user experience, cloud** and **server integration, network infrastructure**, and **system interoperability**, delivering unified solutions for **corporate, government**, and **high-end environments**.

More than specialized resources, we are **technology architects** dedicated to designing solutions that are sustainable, scalable, and aligned with the highest industry standards. We work with your IT, AI, AV teams to **facilitate enterprise grade integration**.
about.intro: Founded in Montreal in 2021, JPrunier Inc. specializes in the programming, integration, and design of advanced technology systems that bridge the worlds of audiovisual, information technology, and artificial intelligence.
about.mission: Our expertise offers modern system programming, user experience, cloud and server integration, network infrastructure, and system interoperability, delivering unified solutions for corporate, government, and high-end environments.
about.vision: More than specialized resources, we are technology architects dedicated to designing solutions that are sustainable, scalable, and aligned with the highest industry standards. We work with your IT, AI, AV teams to facilitate enterprise grade integration.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We embrace emerging technologies and design solutions that evolve with our clients.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: We act with transparency, ethic, and respect - in every project and partnership.

values.title: Precision
values.description: Our craft is technical excellence: every system, every line of code, every signal path.

values.title: Sustainability
values.description: We build long-term, efficient and scalable infrastructures that last.

services.intro: From system architecture and software programming to AV-IT integration and system administration, JPrunier Inc. delivers high-performance technology solutions aligned with the operational needs of modern organizations.

main_services.title: Programming
main_services.subtitle: Control Systems, Software & Intelligent AV Engineering
main_services.description: Our programming services focus on the design and development of reliable, scalable and high-performance control and software solutions for AV and AI environments.
main_services.long_description:
JPrunier designs and develops advanced control systems and software architectures for complex audiovisual environments.

We engineer scalable, secure, and interoperable solutions where AV hardware, IT infrastructure, and intelligent software layers operate as a unified system.
bullets_left: Audio DSP, Dante, Video over IP
bullets_right: Module, driver, plugin for AI – AV industries

features.title: Crestron Control Programming
features.description: SIMPL+, SIMPL#, and C# programming for 3-Series, 4-Series and VC-4 control systems.

features.title: Custom Audiovisual Application Development
features.description: Design and development of AV software solutions, from room control systems to enterprise-wide platforms.

features.title: Audio & DSP Programming
features.description: Programming and optimization of audio DSP systems (Q-SYS, Biamp, Dante environments) including signal processing, routing, and system tuning.

features.title: AI Integration Modules
features.description: Development of drivers, plugins, and middleware connecting AV systems to AI platforms like OpenAI, Azure Cognitive Services, and custom ML models.

features.title: User Interfaces
features.description: Intuitive touch panels, responsive web interfaces, and mobile control applications designed for seamless user experience.

features.title: Cloud & DevOps for AV Systems
features.description: Deployment pipelines, database integration, and cloud-based monitoring platforms for AV infrastructures.

features.title: Multi-System Standardization
features.description: Harmonization and normalization of multi-brand AV systems to ensure consistency, scalability, and maintainability across deployments.

features.title: Cross-Technology Development
features.description: Integration across Crestron, Q-SYS, .NET, Python, Linux, Web technologies, and REST APIs.

main_services.details: We develop custom firmware and applications for Crestron, AMX, and other control systems. Our expertise spans programming languages including SIMPL+, NetLinx, and C# to create robust, scalable solutions that integrate all aspects of your AV environment.

audiovisual_section.title: Audiovisual Expertise
audiovisual_section.description: JPrunier operates across B2B, B2C, and B2G sectors in Canada and Europe. Our programming expertise spans every layer of the audiovisual ecosystem, within architectures built on AV, IT, and AI technologies.

ai_bridge_section.title: AI – AV Bridge
ai_bridge_section.subtitle: JPrunier bridges artificial intelligence and audiovisual technology
ai_bridge_section.description:
We design connected environments where data, control systems, and intelligent software layers operate as a unified ecosystem, enabling automation, adaptability, and enhanced user experience across complex AV deployments.

From intelligent control workflows to AI-enhanced system behavior, our approach transforms traditional AV systems into responsive and evolving platforms.

features.title: Custom AV–AI Application Development
features.description: Design and development of software applications integrating AV systems with AI capabilities, enabling advanced control, automation, and data-driven interactions.

features.title: Multi-System Standardization
features.description: Normalization of multi-brand AV environments to enable consistent behavior, interoperability, and scalable AI integration.

features.title: Machine Learning Integration
features.description: Integration of machine learning models to enhance system behavior, predictive capabilities, and operational efficiency.

features.title: AI-Driven Chatbot Integration
features.description: Implementation of conversational interfaces for system control, monitoring, and user interaction.

interfaces_gallery.title: User Interface Examples
interfaces_gallery.subtitle: Design and development of intuitive touch panel interfaces, responsive CHTML5 projects, web-based dashboards, and mobile control apps.

main_services.title: Consulting
main_services.description: Our consulting services support engineering firms, technology architects, audiovisual consultants and system integrators in the design, optimization and standardization of complex technology environments.
main_services.long_description:
JPrunier provides consulting services at the intersection of audiovisual engineering, IT infrastructure, and artificial intelligence.

Our approach is grounded in real-world implementation experience. We work alongside architects, engineering firms, consultants, and enterprise IT teams to define, structure, and validate technology ecosystems built for performance, scalability, and long-term evolution.

Whether designing new environments or transforming existing infrastructures, we ensure every system is aligned with operational, technical, and user experience objectives.

features.title: Technology Assessment
features.description: Comprehensive evaluation of existing AV and IT infrastructures with recommendations for modernization, optimization, and future scalability.

features.title: Technology & Vendor Strategy
features.description: Independent and vendor-neutral guidance to define the most appropriate platforms, standards, and equipment aligned with your operational objectives.

main_services.details: Our consultants work with you to understand your needs and design solutions that maximize ROI.

ai_bridge_section.title: AI – AV Bridge
ai_bridge_section.tagline: Connected audiovisual architectures designed for performance, scalability, and excellence in user experience.
ai_bridge_section.description: Our consulting practice bridges audiovisual engineering, IT infrastructure, and artificial intelligence. We support engineering firms, technology architects, and integrators in designing future-ready ecosystems.
capabilities: Monitoring and diagnostics of existing systems
Best-practice guidance for integration and supervision

main_services.subtitle: AV, IT & AI Systems Strategy

main_services.title: Administration
main_services.description: Our administration services ensure the reliability, supervision and performance of audiovisual and network systems.
main_services.long_description:
Keeping AV and IT systems running at peak performance requires continuous monitoring, technical expertise, and operational discipline.

JPrunier delivers administration services designed to transform audiovisual systems into managed, observable, and resilient infrastructures. Acting as an extension of your IT team, we ensure reliability, performance, and long-term system stability across complex AV and network environments.

features.title: Firmware & Software Lifecycle Management
features.description: Controlled update cycles for control processors, DSPs, network devices, and collaboration platforms, ensuring stability, compatibility, and security.

features.title: Network & AV-over-IP Administration
features.description: VLAN configuration, QoS optimization, and security management for AV-over-IP, Dante, and converged network infrastructures.

features.title: Performance & System Analytics
features.description: Monitoring of system health, usage data, and performance metrics, with actionable insights for optimization and capacity planning.

main_services.details: We provide ongoing system administration, monitoring, and maintenance to ensure your AV infrastructure operates at peak performance.

ai_bridge_section.title: AI – AV Bridge
ai_bridge_section.tagline: Connected audiovisual architectures designed for performance, scalability, and excellence in user experience.
ai_bridge_section.description: Our administration services ensure system stability across AV-IT-AI environments. We manage AV-IT networking including multicast architectures, Dante audio, Crestron XiO Cloud, Crestron Fusion, and Microsoft Azure environments.
capabilities: Dante audio configuration, optimization and monitoring
XiO Cloud and Crestron Fusion integration and development
Microsoft Azure environment management and supervision

main_services.title: Integration
main_services.description: JPrunier Inc. provides software implementation and configuration for all audiovisual equipment.
main_services.long_description:
JPrunier delivers integration services focused on the deployment of engineered audiovisual and control systems, where hardware, software, and network infrastructures operate as a unified environment.

Our integration methodology ensures every component works together seamlessly, with thorough commissioning and documentation.

features.title: Systems Deployment & Configuration
features.description: Deployment and configuration of audiovisual equipment, control platforms, and network-connected devices, ensuring full alignment with system architecture and design specifications.

features.title: AV-over-IP & Networked Media Systems
features.description: Design and deployment of Dante, AES67, and NVX infrastructures for flexible, scalable, and high-performance media distribution.

features.title: Unified Collaboration Environments
features.description: Deployment of Microsoft Teams Rooms, Zoom Rooms, and Cisco Webex systems, optimized for audio, video, and user experience consistency.

features.title: Commissioning & System Validation
features.description: Comprehensive testing, validation, and documentation to ensure system integrity, performance, and operational readiness.

main_services.details: From design through deployment, we handle the complete integration process.
